summary: The user is planning a team-building event for their marketing firm in Roppongi and is exploring options for private dining and casual lunches. They expressed interest in Korean cuisine and received recommendations for various restaurants that can accommodate a group of 10, ultimately deciding on Korean Kitchen for its casual atmosphere and customizable lunch box options.
facts: The user has been working in Roppongi for about 3 months. The user is part of a marketing firm. The user is planning a team-building event and is looking for a restaurant with a private room in Roppongi. The user is interested in exploring bars in Roppongi for after-work drinks. The user is considering a casual team lunch instead of an after-work gathering. The user is looking for Korean restaurants in Roppongi that can accommodate a group of 10. Korean Kitchen offers a lunch box option for ¥1,500 (around $14 USD) that includes a choice of protein, rice, kimchi, and a customizable side dish. The user prefers a no-frills dining experience for their team lunch. The user can request specific sides or drinks to be included with their lunch box at Korean Kitchen.
